name: Kundali Match
description: (Heuristic v1; not ephemeris-accurate.) Vedic astrology matchmaking assistant — Ashtakoot/Guna Milan + Mangal/Nadi/Rajju dosha framing. Compares each new query against a fixed profile stored on disk.

slash_commands.name: set-profile
slash_commands.description: Set or update the fixed Kundali profile for matching

slash_commands.name: match
slash_commands.description: Compute Ashtakoot compatibility between fixed profile and a candidate. Args: JSON with name, dob (YYYY-MM-DD), gender, optional tob/pob.
